allowed_guarded_actions.instruction: Move the person to fresh air.
If the person is not breathing, call 911 or an ambulance.

do_not_do.instruction: Do not leave the person in the contaminated area after inhalation exposure.

escalation.instruction: Call 911 if not breathing and call a poison control center or doctor for treatment advice.

immediate_actions.instruction: Pindahkan mangsa ke kawasan udara segar.
Jika mangsa tidak bernafas, hubungi 911 atau ambulans.

do_not_do.instruction: Jangan biarkan mangsa berada di kawasan yang tercemar selepas pendedahan sedutan.

escalate_now.instruction: Hubungi 911 jika tidak bernafas dan hubungi pusat kawalan racun atau doktor untuk nasihat rawatan.
escalate_now.reason: Pendedahan sedutan Paraquat dichloride memerlukan penilaian perubatan segera.
